title: Title of third movie has not been revealed
display_title: Title of third movie has not been revealed
wikitext:
[]: Title of third movie has (not) been revealed!!!! Post by darthikari » Sat Nov 12, 2011 7:16 am Anime news network put out an article about a Japanese restaurant chain doing two special edition ramen dishes to celebrate the release of next fall's new movie. Upon closer examination of the ad for the promotion you can clearly see the title; Evangelion You Will (Not) Recieve http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/interest/2011-11-11/evangelion-tomato-ramen-soup-to-be-sold-in-japan One step closer!

[]: Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Nov 12, 2011 7:29 am I didn't see any '3.0' or 'Q' anywhere on there.... maybe a question mark, but I'm not that good with artistic renderings of kanji/kana.... anyway, I'd have to say you're jumping the gun. The phrase You Will (Not) Receive as used here, much like the art linked, seems to focus all on cooking. (which I think we can all hope to goodness the next movie won't continue doing from the previous one.) Also, insert joke about seemingly endless production schedule here.

[]: Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Nov 12, 2011 8:57 am Seele00TextOnly wrote: Also, insert joke about seemingly endless production schedule here.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Nov 12, 2011 9:05 am Seele00TextOnly wrote: I didn't see any '3.0' or 'Q' anywhere on there.... maybe a question mark

[]: Post by symbv » Sat Nov 12, 2011 9:53 am ONLY THE LOGO OF THE RAMEN CHAIN WAS THERE: 太陽のトマト麺 -- Its specialty is tomato ramen and when I lived in Japan I went to this chain quite a few times. There are now quite a number of ramen shops selling tomato ramen so it is no longer that novel. :shrug;: As for the promotion ad, it is clearly a joke. It said　エヴァンゲリヲン新劇場版：丼 丼 (DON) just means the bowl for the ramen. I think the subject of this thread is misleading.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Nov 12, 2011 10:37 am symbv wrote: I think the subject of this thread is misleading.

[]: Post by symbv » Sat Nov 12, 2011 11:08 am ^ The adjustment is inspiring!! :handclaps:

[]: Post by TheFriskyIan » Sat Nov 12, 2011 1:07 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: Also, insert joke about seemingly endless production schedule here.

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sat Nov 12, 2011 1:52 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: I hate how Anno is being lazy about 3.0. Oh look, my insults delayed the movie by another three minutes, damn you Anno! (Another three minutes)

[]: Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Nov 12, 2011 4:10 pm esselfortium wrote: Are you suggesting he's reading these forums instead of working on the movie?

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sat Nov 12, 2011 4:41 pm He's playing foosball in the office. He stopped reading these forums years ago.

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Sat Nov 12, 2011 7:13 pm Why are you guys acting like Anno is working on Rebuild at all? Everyone knows Matt Greenfield created Evangelion. He's the one (not) hard at work on 3.0.

[]: Post by darthikari » Sat Nov 12, 2011 7:44 pm Sorry about posting this here, I had seen the article on ANN and seeing that it is listed as a promotion for the third movie, I took it at face value. I'll try to refrain from starting threads in the future.....

[]: Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Nov 12, 2011 9:31 pm darthikari wrote: Sorry about posting this here, (snip) I'll try to refrain from starting threads in the future.....

[]: Post by TheFriskyIan » Sat Nov 12, 2011 11:37 pm esselfortium wrote: He's playing foosball in the office. He stopped reading these forums years ago.

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Nov 13, 2011 8:01 am I thought this thread was about a poster in a resturaunt. We seem to be cracking Anno jokes with just as much ease as your mom's crack.

[]: Post by chaosakita » Sun Nov 13, 2011 9:45 am Anyways, speaking of the poster, I think either soy milk or tomato ramen sound good to me!

[]: Post by tomfrom994 » Sun Nov 13, 2011 11:03 am Seele00TextOnly wrote: Also, insert joke about seemingly endless production schedule here.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Nov 13, 2011 1:57 pm Less discussion about Anno and NME'S production more discussion about the food tie-ins, please. (Besides, you all do know that Anno/Khara don't have much to do with Eva's merchandising, if Anno's comments on Gainax's NGE still carry over to NME at least.) The ramen dishes look appetizing enough and it's clever of them to have a parody Japanese/English title for the project. (And I wonder if that Eva Cafe that happened for both movies will happen for the third and fourth one? I'd assume so at least.) If I ever visit Japan, I've got to try and found some kind of Eva food tie-in I can actually eat . Freakin' Celiac Disease.

[]: Post by Fallingtogrey » Tue Nov 15, 2011 7:01 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Less discussion about Anno and NME'S production more discussion about the food tie-ins, please.
